channel.title: +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: shAstra-audit
item.description: Source: GA TW Śāstra fails to be taken seriously because of 2 reasons: Where it does contain precious teachings, it fails to be taken seriously because of arrogance on part of a small-minded reader. There is an undeniable bit of genuinely uninspired, over-the-top frivolity, which cannot be taken seriously but unfairly offers a justification for some to not take seriously the śāstravākyas in No.1. Such tripe should have been tempered, done away with or explained away.
